svg.title: Downgrade-and-cascade labeling protocol
svg.desc: Two panels. Left: greedy sequential-locking downgrade search collapses the 4-to-the-N grid to 4 times N, accepting a cheaper tier only if the full trajectory still passes with the same step count. Right: each tier is verified as a pool of three models (accept if any passes), recovering 28 of 33 labels versus 15 of 33 for single-model probing.

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Building 970 verified labels cheaply, without fooling yourself

svg.text: still passes with the SAME number of steps.
